title: First Daanio CLI preview
highlights: Sign in securely through the Daanio browser device flow without manually copying an API key
Use only the first-party Daanio gateway and dynamically load the authenticated account's available chat models
Install prebuilt binaries on Apple Silicon and Intel macOS, plus x86_64 and ARM64 Linux
improvements: Added public shell and PowerShell installers with SHA-256 verification and versioned release metadata
Filtered image and non-chat models from the terminal model picker
Preserved the original jcode history, MIT license, and credit to Jeremy Huang and the jcode contributors
fixes: Release publication now requires the core macOS and Linux assets without being blocked by optional unsigned Windows or FreeBSD targets
The shell installer no longer starts a long source compilation unless DAANIO_BUILD_FROM_SOURCE=1 is explicitly requested
